B-approve-ui.reason: Script used chusantest on /manage/clubs/:qaId + getByRole('tab','Thành viên'). COURT_OWNER lacks canViewFullClubMembers on QA club they created (president is huynhanh1970) — MUI tab never rendered.
B-approve-ui.fix: Approver: huynhanh1970. Primary: /manage/clubs/:id?tab=members. Alternate: /my-club/requests only when active membership matches target club.
B-approve-ui.newSelector: goto /manage/clubs/:id?tab=members; getByRole('button', { name: /^duyệt$/i }) OR /my-club/requests for active-club president

C-assign-owner.reason: govClubId undefined — createClub registry returned no id or case threw before RPC

D-create-club.reason: May pass in isolated context; prior run lacked id in qaArtifacts

E-discover.reason: discoverRpc=0 may be timing or login redirect; diagnostic captures fresh count
